what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 inline SVG outline icon of a 3D cube using currentColor stroke paths and no fill.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the cube with two path elements: an outer hexagonal cube silhouette and internal perspective edges.
standouts: Geometry is compactly encoded in path data.
The icon is purely stroked with no filled shapes.
conventions: Follows common icon SVG conventions for 24px sizing, currentColor stroke, round caps, and round joins.
Keeps all drawing data inline in path elements.
Does not include title, desc, role, or aria attributes.
concerns: No accessible title or description is present, so accessibility behavior depends on how the SVG is embedded.
notes: A compact reusable 3D cube outline icon intended to inherit its color from surrounding text or UI state.
questions: Should this SVG remain decorative, or should it carry accessible labeling when used standalone?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a 3D cube icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a reusable design-system icon that can adapt to surrounding UI color while preserving a consistent outlined cube form.
contribution: Contributes a reusable current-color 3D cube outline asset with compact perspective geometry for icon use.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a 24px SVG currentColor outline icon depicting a 3D cube with two stroked path elements.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a cube or 3D/object concept as a scalable design-system icon.
